nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Kaempfer's woodpecker
nodes.summary: Kaempfer's woodpecker（Kaempfer's woodpecker，学名 Celeus obrieni），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The main threats to the species are probably from habitat loss and degradation through fires, infrastructure development, pasture expansion and conversion to soya plantations." It is estimated that only about 3% of its original habitat remains, and it is "highly fragmented, with patches of cerrado woodland mostly smaller than ."
